name: Lotus Resources Limited
analysis: LOT has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 80% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$0.6600, stop A$0.4851, target A$0.7375 (0.44:1) — then trail it.
